description: Rarely Available almost 1,400 sq.ft. Townhome in Eagle Ridge! Step inside to find Vaulted Ceilings, Large Living/Dining areas that easily fit big furniture, a Gas Fireplace & direct access to a Private Patio and Fenced Backyard. The Kitchen offers Quartz Countertops, Ample Cabinetry & Breakfast Nook. A Powder Room, Laundry & Storage complete the main floor. Above has a generous Primary Suite with three-piece ensuite, plus 2 additional bedrooms, one with a private deck, & a full main bath. Includes 2 covered parking stalls in this well-maintained & self-managed complex w/ low fees. Updates: roof (2024), furnace (2020), hot water tank (2023), and leveled backyard with artificial grass (2024). Steps to schools, parks, trails, shops, and transit. Open House Next Sat/Sun Feb 14th/15th 2-4pm!
